name: model-council
description: Ask a council of local (Ollama, vLLM, TRT-LLM, SGLang) and cloud (OpenAI, Anthropic, Groq) AI models. Get individual, categorized (agreement / complementary / conflicting), or fully deconflicted answers with a resolution score.

ollama_address.title: Ollama address
ollama_address.description: Base URL of your Ollama server. Override host/port if Ollama runs remotely or on a non-default port.

council_models.title: Council models (optional)
council_models.description: Leave BLANK for zero-config: the council auto-uses every local Ollama model plus your Ollama :cloud models. Or pin specific ones, comma-separated: 'ollama:llama3,ollama:qwen3.6:27b-mlx,openai:gpt-4o'. Format: provider:model or provider/serverId:model.

auto_council.title: Auto-discover council
auto_council.description: When ON (default) and no council models are pinned above, automatically use all available Ollama chat models (local + :cloud), excluding embedding models.

judge_model.title: Judge model
judge_model.description: Model that categorizes and deconflicts council responses. Use 'auto' to pick the largest council member.

response_mode.title: Default response mode
response_mode.description: One of: individual | categorized | deconflicted. individual = raw answers; categorized = grouped into agreement/complementary/conflicting; deconflicted = iterative resolution loop with a score.

max_deconflict_rounds.title: Max deconfliction rounds
max_deconflict_rounds.description: Maximum rounds the judge re-questions the council to resolve conflicts (1-10).

openai_api_key.title: OpenAI API key
openai_api_key.description: Optional. Enables OpenAI models (gpt-4o, o1, ...) in the council.

anthropic_api_key.title: Anthropic API key
anthropic_api_key.description: Optional. Enables Anthropic Claude models in the council.

groq_api_key.title: Groq API key
groq_api_key.description: Optional. Enables Groq-hosted models (fast inference) in the council.

vllm_servers.title: vLLM servers
vllm_servers.description: Optional. Comma-separated 'name:host:port' entries for OpenAI-compatible vLLM servers. Port defaults to 8000. Example: 'gpu1:192.168.1.10:8000,gpu2:192.168.1.10:8001'.

trtllm_servers.title: TensorRT-LLM servers
trtllm_servers.description: Optional. Comma-separated 'name:host:port' entries for OpenAI-compatible TRT-LLM servers. Port defaults to 8000.

sglang_servers.title: SGLang servers
sglang_servers.description: Optional. Comma-separated 'name:host:port' entries for OpenAI-compatible SGLang servers. Port defaults to 30000.
